step.title: Decompose into epics
step.action: Decompose the architecture into implementation epics, one per major component or feature area.

step.title: Write acceptance criteria
step.action: Write acceptance criteria for each epic that are specific, measurable, and testable.

step.title: Map traceability
step.action: Map each epic to its source architecture component and PRD requirement(s).

step.title: Produce epics document
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with epic details.
